steps.summary: Opened docs/horizons/field-feedback-runbook.md, docs/plans/2026-07-05-field-feedback-runbook.md, and phases/field-feedback-runbook with FB1~FB4. ROADMAP/OBJECTIVE were moved to active field-feedback-runbook.

Created docs/reports/field-feedback-runbook/2026-07-05-30min-session-runbook.md and 2026-07-05-operator-checklist.md. The runbook links one-page brief, demo bundle, real-transaction sample, incorporation report, questionnaire, and review question supplement into a 30-minute session flow.

Added docs/reports/field-feedback-runbook/runbook_manifest.json, scripts/field_feedback_runbook_check.py, and tests/test_field_feedback_runbook.py. Verification: python -m pytest tests/test_field_feedback_runbook.py -q -> 4 passed; checker ok True.

Closed field-feedback-runbook with docs/reports/2026-07-05-fb4-field-feedback-runbook-close-report.md. Focused tests passed 4, runbook checker ok True, quality_preflight ok/public_safe True, and git diff --check produced only LF->CRLF warnings.
